nodes.label: AI as tone checker for professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: I write out my thoughts and the core content of what I want to communicate to the client first, and then just bring in the AI to help me phrase it professionally

nodes.label: Personal authenticity in client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I want my clients to have a better sense of my personality and what I love about their pets - it feels more personal and authentic to write those myself

nodes.label: AI as tone checker for professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: I don't necessarily trust it enough to hit the right tone and prefer traditional email sequences I've written myself

nodes.label: AI as emotional support in difficult situations
nodes.grounding_span: AI was very helpful in helping me hit a professional tone with that email at a time that I was pretty upset

nodes.label: Client trust and credibility
nodes.grounding_span: I believe that leads to more trust from my clients

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: help me write an email to a client telling them their cat is being aggressive

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for tone-check
nodes.grounding_span: AI was very helpful in helping me hit a professional tone with that email at a time that I was pretty upset

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI for marketing strategy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't necessarily trust it enough to hit the right tone and prefer traditional email sequences I've written myself

nodes.label: Openness to AI for market insights
nodes.grounding_span: I could certainly see an increase in incorporating it into my booking process and initial contact emails, and potentially for marketing

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: for more complicated emails or if the tone isn't quite right, I go back and forth

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs. human-only tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I still write the bulk of my client communications myself
